nasb.text: Each day you shall offer a bull as a sin offering for atonement, and you shall purify the altar when you make atonement for it, and you shall anoint it to consecrate it.

esv.text: and every day you shall offer a bull as a sin offering for atonement. Also you shall purify the altar, when you make atonement for it, and shall anoint it to consecrate it.

cnv.text: 你要每天獻公牛一頭作贖罪祭，用來贖罪；你為祭壇行贖罪祭的時候，你要潔淨祭壇。而且你要用膏抹祭壇，使祭壇成聖。

ccb.text: 每天要献一头公牛作赎罪祭洁净祭坛，然后用膏油抹祭坛，使祭坛圣洁。
